definition:
θυμιατήριον, -ου, τό
 (θυμιάω), [in LXX: 2Ch.26:19, Eze.8:11  (קְטֹרֶת), 4Ma.7:11 * ;] 
  1. as in cl. (Hdt., iv, 162; Thuc., vi, 46) and LXX, a censer: Heb.9:4 (but see infr., and cf. Westc., in l). 
   2. As in Philo., rer. div., § 46, FlJ, Ant., iv, 2, 4, al., the altar of incense: He, l.with (but see supr. and cf. MM, Exp., xv).†
 (AS)
